description: Add login/register screen, logout button, online mode toggle in Settings, and connection status indicator to the UI (qi-webapp/js/ui.js). Also add CSS for these new components (qi-webapp/css/styles.css).
steps: In qi-webapp/js/ui.js, add a login/register screen: When mode='api' and no session exists (QIAPI.me() returns 401), show a login form instead of the dashboard. The login form has email + password text inputs + Login button. If MFA is required (response has mfaRequired:true), show a 6-digit code input. Include a 'Register' link that toggles to a register form (email + password + display name + Register button). On successful auth, proceed to dashboard. NOTE: text inputs for email/password are allowed here as the one exception to the click-only rule.
Add a logout button to the topbar in ui.js. When clicked (and mode='api'), call QIAPI.logout() and return to the login screen. When mode='local', hide the logout button.

Add an 'Online mode' section to RENDER.config in ui.js: A dropdown to switch between 'Offline (local storage)' and 'Online (server)'. When switching to Online, show a dropdown/input for backend URL (defaulting to same-origin ''). Call QIStore.setMode() accordingly. Show current connection status.

Add a connection status indicator to the topbar in ui.js: a small dot (green = connected/authenticated, red = offline/error, grey = local mode). Only visible when mode='api'. Check connection on app boot and periodically.
Add graceful degradation: if mode='api' but backend is unreachable, automatically fall back to local mode with a toast notification 'Server unreachable - working offline'. Never lose data.
Add CSS for login/register form, connection dot indicator, and online mode toggle to qi-webapp/css/styles.css. Login form should be centered, clean, and match the existing card styling.

Ensure the smoke tests still pass: the app boots in mode='local' by default, so the login screen should NOT show during smoke tests. The QIAPI module should gracefully handle not being loaded (smoke tests don't load api.js).
acceptance_criteria: When mode='api' and no session, a login form renders with email + password inputs
Login form handles MFA challenge (shows 6-digit code field when mfaRequired)
Register form shows email + password + displayName fields
Toggle between login/register via a link
Logout button appears in topbar when mode='api', calls QIAPI.logout()
Settings view has Online Mode section with dropdown
Connection status dot shows in topbar when mode='api'
If backend unreachable in api mode, falls back to local with toast
Existing 209 smoke tests still pass unchanged
No free-text inputs added to data views (login form is the only exception)
verification: Run 'node smoke.js' in qi-webapp/ and confirm ALL SMOKE TESTS PASSED
Run 'node test.js' in qi-webapp/ and confirm all suites PASS
Run 'node api.test.js' in qi-webapp/ and confirm it passes
findings: All tests pass: smoke.js (199 assertions, same as base), test.js (7 suites), api.test.js (54 assertions). The smoke tests do NOT load api.js so window.QIAPI is undefined during tests - handled gracefully. The login screen only shows when BOTH mode='api' AND me() returns non-ok (401). Network errors trigger graceful fallback to local mode with toast. The connStatus variable is declared at IIFE scope top so RENDER.config can access it. The API module now reads base URL dynamically via getBase() instead of cached variable, allowing runtime URL changes.
